description: All documents in this workspace — sources, extractions, notes, drafts, and the eventual deliverable. Freely added as work emerges. Front-matter declares each document's role.

kind.description: The role this document plays in the workspace.

parent.description: Filename (without .md) of the predecessor document, if any.

order.description: Sort hint for grouping in nav.

focus.description: If true, this is a focal source/draft — surface prominently in the nav.
